title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero explains that AI coding assistants plateau at 40% productivity gains when focused narrowly on code generation. The real opportunity lies in agentic systems deployed across the full software development lifecycle, including bug triage, security review, and growth experimentation, with organizational adaptation required to realize gains.
